---
title: "Discography"
---

Past shows:

## November 2025

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LbviT1G73F0 title="November 2025">}}

## Songs played:

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
songs <- read.csv("songs.csv")

library(DT)
datatable(songs, rownames=FALSE,
          options=list(
            pageLength=5,
            lengthMenu=c(5,10,15,20,25)
          ))
```
